hero_title_accent: For VASP Executives and Risk Leaders
hero_subtitle: SFTY gives senior compliance teams a structured, auditable framework to oversee decisions, preserve evidence, and maintain control across digital asset compliance workflows.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Executive teams struggle to trace who made key compliance decisions and why, leaving audit trails incomplete and governance controls weak. This opacity slows risk oversight and complicates defensible reporting across digital asset workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY creates an auditable framework linking decisions, reviewers, policies and evidence to give executives clear oversight and traceability across all compliance workflows for defensible governance.
workflow_title: From provider checks to governance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY consolidates compliance checks into structured reviews with controlled decision logging and evidence preservation to support clear executive risk governance.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another dashboard. Executive risk visibility
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides VASP executives a clear, audit-ready operating view that connects compliance decisions, evidence and workflows beyond isolated dashboards or fragmented tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides VASP leaders a controlled compliance layer enabling decision transparency, audit-ready evidence and operational readiness for bank due diligence and enterprise deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How does SFTY support executive decision governance controls
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how compliance decisions are recorded and audited
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how SFTY preserves evidence behind compliance choices
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how governance models improve risk control visibility
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP executives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP executives with a connected view of compliance decisions, risk controls and audit trails to manage operational risk and scale governance across onboarding, KYT, Travel Rule and reporting.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support compliance decision workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures compliance workflows by connecting provider outputs into cases, routing reviews, recording decision logs and preserving evidence along controlled, rule-based operational paths.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, supporting evidence and case history with audit-grade records that enable traceability and review readiness for internal and external examinations.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates above KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, linking their outputs into a cohesive compliance operating layer without replacing core tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs to create structured workflows, enforce governance controls and maintain a consistent audit trail across compliance operations.
final_title: Structure compliance decision governance with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY supports audit-ready workflows, decision records and scalable governance for VASP compliance leadership teams.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
